provider.disabled: Provider is disabled, please enable it first
provider.delete_models_hint: Deleting a provider will cascade-delete all its models
provider.no_chat_model: No available chat model found for this provider. Please add and enable one first

model.invalid_type: Model type is "{type}", chat is not supported
model.disabled: Model is disabled, please enable it first
model.provider_disabled: Provider is disabled, please enable it first

chat.rate_limited: Request exceeds model QPS limit, please retry later
chat.context_exceeded: Estimated token count ({estimated}) approaches or exceeds model context length ({max_tokens}). Please shorten the conversation history or use a model with a larger context window.
chat.max_rounds_reached: Max tool-calling rounds reached, forcing final answer
chat.select_conversation_model_first: Please select a conversation and model first
chat.empty_desc: Choose an existing conversation from the left, or create a new one
chat.input_placeholder_rag: Ask about your linked knowledge bases...
chat.empty_response: The model returned no content. Please retry or switch models
chat.message_not_persisted: This message is still syncing, please retry after the current turn finishes

admin.seed_done: Seed complete: created {created} providers and {models} models, skipped {skipped} existing providers
admin.seed_file_not_found: Preset data file not found. Please ensure shared/providers.json exists

settings.embed_max_concurrency: Max parallel embedding API calls during indexing
settings.embed_use_model_qps: Let embedding concurrency follow model QPS

descriptions.model_type_filter: Filter by type: chat / embedding / reranking
descriptions.capability_filter: Filter by capability: vision / reasoning / function_calling
descriptions.test_model_id: Model ID for testing; auto-selects the first available chat model if omitted

kb.embed_model_invalid_type: Model type is {type}, not an embedding model
kb.embed_model_gone: The embedding model linked to this knowledge base no longer exists. Please update to a valid model and re-index
kb.file_too_large: File '{filename}' exceeds the {max_mb} MB upload limit
kb.delete_docs_hint: Deleting a knowledge base will also delete all its documents and vector data
kb.empty_after_parsing: File content is empty after parsing
kb.no_chunks: No chunks produced after text splitting
kb.import_dimension_mismatch: Inconsistent embedding dimensions in export file
kb.import_model_mismatch: Model mismatch: file was exported with '{exported}' but you selected '{selected}'. Search results will be incorrect if these models produce incompatible vector spaces.

conversation.clear_all_warning: This will delete ALL conversations and cannot be undone

citation.not_found: No citation found for this document

auxmodel.cleaner_failed: Document text cleaning failed, keeping raw text

dialog.no_folder_hint: No folders yet. Create one from the sidebar first

settings_page.stream_output_desc: When enabled, tokens are shown progressively. When disabled, the full answer returns at once
settings_page.chat_citation_mode_desc: Document: group citations by paper (e.g. [1][2][3] for the same paper); Chunk: show citations per retrieved chunk
settings_page.chat_citation_style_desc: Controls how references are formatted in chat responses, such as APA, MLA, Chicago, or GB/T 7714
settings_page.chat_history_turns_desc: Number of recent conversation turn pairs to send to the model (0 = unlimited). Lower values reduce context size and help prevent context overflow in long conversations.
settings_page.chat_max_tool_rounds_desc: Maximum number of times the model can call the knowledge base search tool per RAG turn (1-20). Lower values speed up responses and reduce token usage.
settings_page.chat_compress_model_desc: When history exceeds the retained turns limit, this model compresses old turns into a summary before passing them to context. Leave empty to simply drop old turns.
settings_page.reset_dialog_desc: This will reset all settings to defaults. Continue?
settings_page.rag_top_k_desc: Maximum number of chunks returned per retrieval
settings_page.single_search_top_k_desc: Default upper bound for semantic-only or keyword-only retrieval
settings_page.hybrid_keyword_floor_top_k_desc: Minimum number of keyword results kept in hybrid mode; final cap is Single-search Top K + this value
settings_page.pdf_parser_desc: Parser used to extract text from PDF files
settings_page.docx_parser_desc: Parser used to extract text from Word documents
settings_page.embed_max_concurrency_desc: Maximum concurrent embedding tasks within a single document (effective only when "follow model QPS" is off)
settings_page.embed_use_model_qps_desc: When enabled, indexing will prefer the embedding model's QPS as the concurrency cap (falls back to manual value if model QPS is unset)
settings_page.kb_index_max_workers_desc: Number of documents processed in parallel during batch add/reindex (document-level concurrency)
settings_page.doc_clean_model_desc: Cleans raw document text and formatting noise
settings_page.doc_clean_keep_references_desc: When enabled, the AI cleaner will preserve reference/bibliography sections at the end of the document. Off by default (references are stripped during cleaning).
settings_page.doc_clean_keep_annotations_desc: When enabled, the AI cleaner will preserve footnote/endnote/annotation sections. Off by default (annotations are stripped during cleaning).
settings_page.chat_summary_model_desc: Compresses long chat history into summaries
settings_page.info_extract_model_desc: Extracts citation evidence from retrieval results

search.rerank_desc: Re-scores the initial results with a reranker model for higher relevance precision. Requires a Rerank model configured in the knowledge base
search.top_k_desc: Maximum number of results returned per search, applied globally even when searching across multiple knowledge bases
search.no_results_desc: Try refining your query or switching search type
search.start_hint: Enter a query and click Search
search.diversity_desc: Keep only the best matching chunk per document, ensuring results from different files

providers.empty_desc: Choose an existing provider on the left, or add a new one
providers.delete_provider_desc: This will delete the provider and all its models. This action cannot be undone.
providers.delete_model_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this model?
providers.enable_provider_first: Enable the provider first before enabling its models
providers.request_failed_check_network: Request failed. Please check your network
providers.no_model_hint: No models yet. Click "Add Model" to create one
providers.qps_limit_desc: Max requests per second. Leave empty or 0 for unlimited

knowledge.empty_title: Select or create a knowledge base
knowledge.empty_desc: Choose an existing knowledge base on the left, or create a new one
knowledge.use_delimiter_split_desc: When enabled, chunks are split at structural boundaries (headings, paragraphs, sentences) first for better semantic coherence. When disabled, plain character-count splitting is used.
knowledge.match_failed_with_reason: Failed to match citations from text: {reason}
knowledge.delete_kb_desc: This will delete the knowledge base and all its documents. This action cannot be undone.
knowledge.delete_doc_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
knowledge.duplicate_intro: These files already exist in this knowledge base:
knowledge.duplicate_reparse: Re-parse - remove old data and process these files again
knowledge.duplicate_skip: Skip duplicates - only add new files
knowledge.duplicate_add_all: Add all - keep duplicates as separate documents

document_table.parse_from_text_desc: Paste text containing citation clues. AI will match and write them into selected documents.
document_table.parse_from_text_placeholder: Paste citation text here, one citation per line...
document_table.ai_parse_confirm_desc: Generated citations come only from document content and may contain errors. Continue?
document_table.no_docs_hint: No documents yet. Click "Add Documents" to upload

citation_form.paste_desc: - auto-parse into fields below, or edit manually
citation_form.paste_placeholder: Example: Smith, J. (2024). Data governance in local systems. Journal of Industry, 5, 79-96.
citation_form.title: Title
